hero.headline: Your Smile, Our Priority
hero.description: At {businessName}, we combine gentle care with modern dentistry to give you the healthy, beautiful smile you deserve.

services.headline: Our Dental Services
services.description: Comprehensive care for the whole family.

items.title: Teeth Cleaning
items.desc: Professional cleaning to keep your smile bright and healthy.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.desc: Permanent tooth replacement that looks and feels natural.

items.title: Teeth Whitening
items.desc: Brighten your smile up to 8 shades in one visit.

items.title: Orthodontics
items.desc: Clear aligners and braces to straighten your smile.

items.title: Gum Treatment
items.desc: Advanced periodontal care to protect your gum health.

items.title: Sedation Dentistry
items.desc: Anxiety-free dental care for a comfortable experience.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: Absolutely incredible experience. The team made me feel at ease from the moment I walked in.

items.name: James T.
items.text: Best dental practice I've ever been to. Professional, thorough, and genuinely caring staff.

items.name: Rachel K.
items.text: My smile transformation was beyond what I imagined. I can't stop smiling now — truly life-changing!

dentists.footer: Delivering expert dental care with compassion and cutting-edge technology.

hero.headline: Sharp Cuts, Classic Style
hero.description: At {businessName}, we provide premium grooming services that leave you looking and feeling your best. Experience the art of the cut.

services.headline: Grooming Services
services.description: From classic cuts to modern fades.

items.title: Haircut & Style
items.desc: Precision cuts tailored to your head shape and hair type.

items.title: Beard Trim
items.desc: Sculpting and lining to keep your facial hair looking sharp.

items.title: Hot Towel Shave
items.desc: The ultimate relaxation with a traditional straight razor shave.

items.title: Head Shave
items.desc: Smooth, clean finish with moisturizing aftercare.

items.title: Hair Coloring
items.desc: Natural-looking gray coverage or bold new colors.

items.title: Facial Treatments
items.desc: Deep cleaning and hydration for the modern man.

items.text: Best haircut I've ever had. The attention to detail is unmatched.

items.name: Mark R.
items.text: Great atmosphere and even better service. I've found my regular barber.

items.name: Chris B.

barbers.footer: Sharp cuts and premium grooming since 2015. Your neighborhood favorite.
